subject: Enhance 5g bulk PM test case in order to use blueprints from DCAE inventory
commit_message:
Enhance 5g bulk PM test case in order to use blueprints from DCAE inventory

Issue-ID: INT-1521

Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Kuzmicki <krzysztof.kuzmicki@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Ia99231521dfb1755177a9ac1ad8c43771b4c8726

entries.message:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.
